Question: Do you maintain a formal Information Security Management System (ISMS)?
Are you certified against ISO 27001 SOC 2 Type II HITRUST or PCI DSS? Please attach certificates or audit reports.
Do you conduct periodic security risk assessments and is there a designated security officer or CISO?
Are security policies reviewed annually and acknowledged by employees?
Do you maintain an inventory of hardware and software assets?
Are assets classified based on sensitivity and are asset owners assigned?
Is MFA enforced for administrative accounts remote access cloud services and VPN access?
Which MFA technologies are used and are shared accounts prohibited?
Is password complexity enforced and are dormant accounts disabled automatically?
Is privileged access monitored and logged and are access reviews performed periodically?
Is data encrypted at rest and which standard is used (for example AES-256)?
Is data encrypted in transit and which TLS version is enforced (for example TLS 1.2+ or TLS 1.3)?
Are encryption keys managed securely and are backups encrypted?
Is full disk encryption enabled on endpoints?
Are security logs centrally collected and are authentication and privileged actions logged?
Are logs monitored continuously using a SIEM and how long are they retained?
Are alerts generated for suspicious activity?
Are vulnerability scans conducted regularly and are penetration tests performed annually?
Are critical vulnerabilities remediated within defined timelines and is patch management automated?
Do you use EDR or antivirus solutions?
Do you maintain a formal incident response plan and is it tested?
Is there a breach notification process and what is your notification timeline for customer-impacting breaches?
Describe your incident escalation process.
Do you maintain business continuity and disaster recovery plans?
What are your Recovery Time Objective (RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO)?
Are backups tested regularly and are disaster recovery exercises conducted annually?
Are firewalls deployed and is network segmentation implemented?
Are IDS/IPS systems used and is remote access secured?
Are default passwords changed before deployment and are wireless networks secured?
Do you follow a Secure SDLC and are code reviews required?
Are SAST or DAST tools used and are dependencies scanned for vulnerabilities?
Are developers trained on secure coding and is production access restricted?
Do you process personal data or special category data?
Do you maintain a Record of Processing Activities and support Data Subject Rights requests?
Do you have a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) and do you use subprocessors?
Are cross-border transfers performed and which transfer mechanisms (for example SCCs) are used?
Do you conduct DPIAs where required and what is your data retention and deletion process?
Do you process Protected Health Information (PHI) and are HIPAA Security Rule safeguards implemented?
Is a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) available and are PHI access logs maintained and is PHI encrypted?
Do you assess vendors before onboarding and are security requirements included in contracts?
Are vendor security reviews conducted periodically and are subprocessors monitored?
Are data centers physically secured with badge access and visitor logs?
Are CCTV systems deployed and is equipment securely disposed?
Are background checks conducted and is security awareness training mandatory?
Are termination procedures documented and is access revoked promptly upon termination?
Are internal and external security audits conducted?
Have you experienced any material security breaches in the last 3 years and are compliance exceptions tracked?
